pr_analyzer.title: PR Analyzer
pr_analyzer.blurb: Agentic GitHub PR intelligence — topic clustering, duplicate hints, 0–100 quality scoring, merge recommendations and NL chat over your repo. RocketRide pipelines + Qdrant RAG + Claude, on FastAPI & Next.js.

turn-based-strategy-mcp-server.title: Unity MCP × RocketRide
turn-based-strategy-mcp-server.blurb: A Unity tactical battle where an LLM is the strategist — Unity MCP talks to a RocketRide pipeline, and Claude (or a local Ollama model) chooses moves through MCP tool calls.

3t_soccer_webots_agent.title: 3T Soccer Agent
3t_soccer_webots_agent.blurb: A ROBOTIS OP2 humanoid plays soccer in Webots on a 3-tier stack — native skills, numpy vision and an FSM, with a RocketRide agent whose tool nodes (walk, kick…) plan over a local MCP command bus.

shajin.title: Sentiment Twitter Bot
shajin.blurb: A Twitter bot that runs VADER sentiment analysis on a user's recent tweets and replies with a plotted sentiment timeline — mention it, get the chart back.

ar_drone_wrapper.title: AR Drone Wrapper
ar_drone_wrapper.blurb: A ROS package to fly a Parrot AR Drone — commands, navigation data and camera streams over ROS topics; the perception-and-actuation layer for autonomous agents.

dsa_robotis_nano.title: Robotis Mini Controller
dsa_robotis_nano.blurb: A Python + ROS library to drive a ROBOTIS Mini humanoid over Bluetooth — a clean motion-control layer for experimenting with embodied robots.
